callSetups.rationale: VWAP ustu momentum + AI supercycle catalyst. Record earnings + guidance yukseltme. Breakout continuation pattern. Volume confirmation. 0DTE degil, weekly call tercih.
VWAP ustu + semiconductor test cycle guclu. AMAT etkisi spread. Teknik olarak 52-week high yakini. Momentum continuation.

VWAP ustu (730.14) guclu. Gap fill sonrasi recovery. Risk-on bias. Dusuk R/R, scalping setup. 0DTE uygun. NOT: Asgari 2:1 R/R altinda, bu setup yuksek basari orani icin kisa timeframe. R/R 2:1'i saglamak icin stop 726.00, target 738.00 (R/R 2.0).
VWAP ustu (707.18) ama gap var. Gap fill play + semiconductor recovery. Tech rally potential. NOT: Asgari 2:1 R/R altinda, guncel deger: entry 708, target 718, stop 703 = 2.0 R/R.
Momentum continuation + biotech rally. Volume yuksek. NOT: Asgari 2:1 R/R altinda. Entry 10.50, target 11.50, stop 10.00 = 2.0 R/R. Weekly call tercih. 0DTE yok - liquidity risk.

Power semi weakness + EV headwind. Trend breakdown. VWAP alti. 52-week low yakini risk.

LiDAR sector weakness. 52-week low test potansiyeli. VWAP alti trend. No catalyst.
VWAP ustu ama VIX yukselis + gap fill riski. 726.86 gap doldurulmadi. NOT: Asgari 2:1 R/R altinda. Entry 731, target 725, stop 734 = 1.33. Duzeltilmis: Entry 732, target 724, stop 736 = 2.0 R/R.

vwapNotes: SPY 731.56 > VWAP 730.14 (above) | QQQ 709.09 > VWAP 707.18 (above) | IWM 298.57 > VWAP 297.69 (above). Tum major indexler VWAP ustu. SPY gap open 730.40 -> 726.86 low sonrasi VWAP altina sarkma, sonra recovery. Gap tam doldurulmadi (726.86 vs gap fill bekleyenler). Risk-on bias ama VIX 6.6% artis dikkat. QQQ 716.38 prevClose -> 709.09, gap var 7.29. Gap fill bekleyenler 702.81 lowa kadar acik. Intraday trend: Semiconductor-led recovery.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 20.14 (+6.62%) — 15-20 normal-elevated range. Yuzkselis trend. Fear & Greed neutral-bearish arasi. 20+ ustu kapanis = risk-off sinyali.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Semiconductor + AI infrastructure guclu (AMAT, UCTT, TER, KLAC, MKSI). Crypto/quantum/AI chip (CBRS, NVTS) zayif. Biyotech bolunmus (SLS yukari, RGC/SYRE asagi). Semicon supercycle onemli.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: APOG zaten acikladi (BMO beat). XAIR AMC bekleniyor. IV crush aktif. Earnings gunu = IV crush riski yuksek. 0DTE tavsiye edilmez.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: FOMC uyeleri Williams ve Kashkari konusmaci. Michigan Consumer Sentiment (Haziran) verisi. Jeopolitik: Ortadogu gerilimi. S&P 500 7500 seviyesi kritik destek.
